src: A person with wavy, fair warm-colored hair and a well-groomed beard, wearing a grey fleece with a quarter-zip, is positioned against a textured concrete wall.
edit: An anime character with golden exaggerated wavy hair and detailed beard, dressed in a grey fleece with quarter-zip, shown with anime outlines, stands against a textured concrete wall. Soft lighting highlights the face in an anime style with vibrant hues, blending modern elements with vivid artistry.
